Introduction:
Red teaming is a method used by organizations to test their security posture by simulating an attack on their network. In this context, the goal of the red team is to breach the network's security and steal sensitive information. This article will provide detailed guidance on how to hack into a secure network to steal confidential information for advanced red teaming purposes.
